_description: Access rules for the Job Agent. These control what the agent can do with your email and applications.

read._note: Agent may read subject, sender, body, headers — whatever is needed to classify recruiter emails. No restrictions on what can be read.

write._note: Agent may NOT delete, archive, move, mark-as-read, or modify any email without explicit per-action approval. If an action would change inbox state, it MUST ask first.

scan_filter._note: Scan for any recruiter-like email (ATS domains, interview/rejection/offer keywords). Non-pipeline companies are shown in actions but don't auto-update pipeline statuses.

auto_send._note: Jobs scored as STRONG_MATCH (score >= 80) may be sent automatically. GOOD_FIT, REACH, and unscored jobs always need review before sending.

require_review._note: These jobs need explicit approval before the email is sent. The agent will draft and show you, then ask.

sending._note_dry_run: Set to true to make ALL sends preview-only (safety lock). Set to false for normal operation.

auto_update_status._note: Agent may automatically update job status in data/jobs.json when it detects recruiter replies (interview → 'interviewing', rejection → 'rejected', offer → 'offer'). It will always report what it changed.
